name: MCP Tool Cards
description: Static GenUI where the tool results themselves come from a real MCP server, rendered into a fixed set of pre-built cards.
whenToUse: Reach for this variant when you already have (or want) tools exposed over MCP — e.g. shared with other agent clients — but still want the strict static-catalog safety boundary on the rendering side.
previewPrompts: What's the deployment status of the bench service?
What's the status of the jury service?
